metadata.name: Add a New Product to the Store

description: A merchandiser needs to add a brand new product to the e-commerce platform.

nodes.task_description: Create a new product entry with its SKU, name, description, price, and specifications.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully populates all required fields for the new product.

nodes.task_description: Upload product images and assign them to the new product entry.

expected_outcome.value: Agent uploads and correctly links images to the product.

nodes.task_description: Assign the product to the appropriate categories and set its initial inventory level.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly categorizes the product and sets its stock.
